title: Romanian PM ousted in no-confidence vote
summary_full: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.
summary_public: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.

RO.label: negative
RO.evidence: Romanian PM ousted in no-confidence vote
